channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Hagel scores 3, Hedman adds 2 as Lightning beat Devils 8-5
item.description: Brandon Hagel had three goals for his second career hat trick, Victor Hedman scored twice and the Tampa Bay Lightning beat the New Jersey Devils 8-5 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jack Flaherty will start for Dodgers in World Series opener against Gerrit Cole and Yankees
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Jack Flaherty will start for the Los Angeles Dodgers in the World Series opener against the New York Yankees and Gerrit Cole on Friday night at Dodger Stadium in a matchup of area natives. Flaherty is from nearby Burbank and attended high school at Harvard-Westlake in Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bucs with Bowles deals with tough loss and 2 devastating injuries
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers suffered a devastating 41-31 loss to the Baltimore Ravens on Monday, but on Tuesday, Head Coach Todd Bowles was left with two gaping holes on the offense.
item.dc:creator: Dan Lucas, WFLA, NBC

item.title: POLL: MLB wants the Tampa Bay Rays to play in the area if hurricane-damaged Tropicana Field is unfit
item.description: Major League Baseball hopes to find the Tampa Bay Rays a temporary home near their fanbase for the start of the 2025 season if their home field can't be repaired in time. Tropicana Field's fabric dome in St. Petersburg was shredded by Hurricane Milton’s winds.
item.dc:creator: CURT ANDERSON, WFLA, NBC

item.title: BYU staying humble and hungry during winning streak
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It was a drive that will go down in school history. The 4th-and-8 conversion to Chase Roberts. The Jake Retzlaff 27-yard scramble. And then the 35-yard strike to Darius Lassiter with 10 seconds left to beat Oklahoma State, 38-35.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: PPR Podcast #194: Brodie Stump, Kearny QB
item.description: All Kearny's Brodie Stump does is throw touchdown passes. That's why he's earned a center seat in PPR Podcast #194.
item.dc:creator: Maddy Worley, Fox 5

item.title: After bye week, Bears hope to maintain momentum for upcoming key games
item.description: Given a week off after their offense got rolling against Jacksonville in London, Caleb Williams and the Chicago Bears might have been better served without a Week 7 bye.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Want to see the Dodgers in the World Series? Prepare for sticker shock
item.description: The Boys in Blue are back in the World Series, and the matchup with the New York Yankees is sure to draw a great deal of attention. If you want to catch a game in person, however, it will also cost you a great deal of cash.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: Yankees and Dodgers meet in World Series for 12th time in matchup of Broadway and Hollywood
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Broadway vs. Hollywood. Subway vs. Freeway. Judge vs. Ohtani. New York neighbors who became cross-country rivals, the Yankees and Dodgers renew their starry struggle in the World Series for the first time in 43 years.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: WNBA champion, Bay Area native shattered records in latest series
item.description: (KRON) – The New York Liberty officially won a WNBA Championship after defeating the Minnesota Lynx in a nail-biting Game 5 (67-62). Liberty point guard and Miramonte High School alum Sabrina Ionescu won her first chip with multiple accolades.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Texas fined $250K for trash thrown onto field, must ID and ban fans
item.description: The SEC said it won't suspend alcohol sales at Texas events, but "reserves the right to do so if other requirements are not met.
item.dc:creator: Billy Gates, NewsNation

item.title: FINAL | Bucs 31, Ravens 41
item.description: In the early 2000s, the Tampa Bay Buccaneers and the Baltimore Ravens were synonymous with great defense in the NFL, but now they are playing a different brand of football.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: USF downs UAB, 35-25, outscoring Blazers 28-6 down the stretch
item.description: TAMPA (usf) - Returning to Raymond James Stadium for the first time in three weeks, South Florida (3-4; 1-2 American) outscored UAB 28-6 down the stretch to notch its first American Athletic Conference win of the season, 35-25, over the Blazers (1-6; 0-4 American) on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Brian Siegrist, USF, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Ticker-tape parade after NY Liberty win: Everything you need to know
item.description: NEW YORK CITY (PIX11) – After a massive win for the New York Liberty Sunday night, the city is ready to celebrate. On Thursday, New York City will host a ticker-tape parade for the team's first-ever WNBA championship title, Mayor Eric Adams announced. The parade will kick off at 10 a.m.
item.dc:creator: Emily Rahhal, PIX 11

item.title: Dodgers finish off Mets with 10-5 win in NLCS and advance to face Yankees in World Series
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Shohei Ohtani carried the injury-riddled Los Angeles Dodgers to baseball's best record during the regular season. Tommy Edman joined the team in late July and helped them reach the World Series. It's been that kind of year for the big-spending Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Moody agrees to 3-year, $39M extension with Warriors: report
item.description: (KRON) -- The Golden State Warriors and guard Moses Moody have agreed to a multi-year contract extension, ESPN's Shams Charania posted Sunday evening on X. The extension is reportedly for three years and $39 million, which is an average annual value of about $13 million.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Alonso and Mets extend season again, beating Dodgers 12-6 to send NLCS back to LA for Game 6
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Not easy to knock out these New York Mets. Pete Alonso golfed an early three-run homer and the Mets hammered an ineffective Jack Flaherty, extending the National League Championship Series with a 12-6 victory over the Los Angeles Dodgers in Game 5 on Friday.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Guardians starting Tanner Bibee in Game 5 against Yankees after short outing earlier in ALCS
item.description: Tanner Bibee is getting a second crack at the Yankees in the AL Championship Series. His first one didn't go so well. The right-hander will start for the Cleveland Guardians in Game 5 on Saturday after he was pulled from Game 2 in the second inning by manager Stephen Vogt.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: New renderings show how A's ballpark would transform Las Vegas Strip
item.description: The domed ballpark would have a 373,000-square-foot footprint and is expected to reach a height of 320 feet.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, NewsNation

item.title: Bears hanging tough in an NFC North that's dominated the rest of the NFL so far
item.description: GREEN BAY, Wis. (AP) — Never in the past two decades has any division started out as strong as the NFC North has this season. With the undefeated Minnesota Vikings leading the way, all four NFC North teams are 4-2 or better.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
